---
title: "PlaybackHUD.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/PlaybackHUD.tsx"

complexity: 6
logic_score: 7.45
style_score: 2.74
intel_score: 2.77
overall_score: 4.32
---

## Intent
React component rendering PlaybackHUD with 6 logic branches.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 2.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports

### Exports
- `PlaybackHUD`
- `PlaybackHUD`
